official_functions.role: Construct the official minecraft:brand custom payload fixture
Write the official custom payload body bytes inside custom_payload
Construct the official Configuration clientbound custom_payload packet fixture
Write the official Configuration clientbound custom_payload body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed custom_payload packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed custom_payload packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read decoded custom_payload fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the custom_payload body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket preserves the BrandPayload payload id and brand string produced by the official fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, custom payload body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded payload class, decoded payload id, decoded brand, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
